A.rationale: Map A captures the core narrative and key stages of the paper but restructures the original sections into thematic blocks, losing some of the detailed taxonomy (especially in Stage 1 and datasets) present in the text. Some nodes are slightly wordy, though the extracted information remains highly accurate.

B.rationale: Map B perfectly mirrors the paper's comprehensive hierarchical structure, providing excellent depth across all sections from modular reasoning to N-LMRMs and benchmarks. The branches are well-balanced, and the nodes are highly concise, accurately capturing a vast amount of specific models and paradigms without unnecessary filler.
